title: Wynnic Trinkets
description: Adds 3D models to various wynncraft items
body:
# 📖 About Wynnic Trinkets adds several 3D models to various items in Wynncraft.
Click here for a list of currently remodeled items - Emeralds - Ability Shards - Health Potions - Mana Potions - Air/Thunder/Water/Earth/Fire Powders - Isoptera Heart - Speed Surges - Third Clarion - All kinds of Tomes - Teleportation Scrolls - Runes
## Required/recommended mods - Optifine: Required for custom item textures and emissive textures when using forge. - CIT Resewn: Required for custom item textures when using fabric. ## 🌐 My other projects - Teyvat Weapon Collection - Cork and Balls - Annihilating Armory
